philippines.title: Rondina, Pons fall short in Beach Pro Tour after heartbreaker to Swiss
philippines.description:
SANTA ROSA, Laguna — Sisi Rondina and Bernadeth Pons missed the chance to advance to the round of 24 of the Volleyball World Beach Pro Tour Nuvali Challenge after a heartbreaking 20-22, 22-24 loss to Switzerland’s Annique Niederhauser and Menia Bentele on Thursday at Nuvali Sands Courts here. Rondina and Pons pushed the more experienced and taller Swiss pair, even holding a 19-16 lead in the second set and moving within two points of forcing a decider. READ: Experience awaits as Rondina-Pons battles world-class field But Bentele and Niederhauser responded with four straight points to reach match point, 20-19. The […]...
Keep on reading: Rondina, Pons fall short in Beach Pro Tour after heartbreaker to Swiss

philippines.title: Ray Parks Jr. opens door to ‘next chapter’ after Osaka exit
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines — Fresh off his season-ending stint with Osaka Evessa in the Japan B.League, Ray Parks Jr. is back in the Philippines for the offseason and some much-needed family time. During the B.League Final Week at SM Megamall on Thursday, Parks Jr. said he decided to move on from Osaka in search of a new challenge. “For me, it was time to move on to the next chapter, whatever that may be,” he told reporters. “I felt like it was my time to depart from Osaka. We achieved what we achieved and I feel like I just want to […]...
Keep on reading: Ray Parks Jr. opens door to ‘next chapter’ after Osaka exit

philippines.title: 'Always ready': NBI set for Dela Rosa manhunt after DOJ arrest order
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines — National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) Director Melvin Matibag said Thursday that the bureau is “always ready” to launch a manhunt to arrest Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa. Matibag shared this in an ambush interview at the NBI headquarters following the order of the Department of Justice (DOJ) to enforce the arrest warrant of the International Criminal Court (ICC) issued against the senator. READ MORE: ‘Justice will be served’: Palace vows to enforce Bato arrest warrant “The NBI is always ready,” Matibag told reporters. The NBI director, meanwhile, refused to confirm whether the NBI has already launched the […]...
Keep on reading: 'Always ready': NBI set for Dela Rosa manhunt after DOJ arrest order

energy.title: China's Solar Exports Soar as World Grapples with Energy Crisis
energy.description: Despite the end of China's export tax refunds on April 1, exports of Chinese solar cells and panels continued to surge in April as demand for solar installations in Africa, Southeast Asia, and Europe soars amid the oil and gas crisis. Exports to Southeast Asia and Africa eased off the records in March, which benefited from the export refund policy. But they were up by 75-85% compared to April 2025, according to official Chinese customs data carried by Reuters. Despite the expectations of higher prices of the products without the tax refund, overseas…

energy.title: U.S. Energy Storage Installations Post Record First Quarter
energy.description: Despite unfavorable federal policies, the U.S. energy storage additions jumped by 31% from a year earlier to 9.7 gigawatt-hours (GWh) in the first quarter of 2026, the strongest first quarter in history, a new report showed on Thursday.    With energy storage gaining momentum, U.S. developers are set to install more than 610 GWh of energy storage by 2030, according to the report by the Solar Energy Industries Association (SEIA) and Benchmark Mineral Intelligence. The estimates through 2030 were revised up from earlier forecasts as investors,…
